_meta.description: Static, offline emission-factor table used by GreenLedger. No paid or gated API is used to compute footprints.

sources.source: US EPA eGRID2022 (published Jan 2024), U.S. national average CO2-equivalent output emission rate
US EPA GHG Emission Factors Hub (2024), Stationary Combustion - Natural Gas (converted from 53.06 kg CO2e/MMBtu, 1 therm = 0.1 MMBtu, includes CH4/N2O)
US DOE/EPA Water-Energy Nexus estimate (~1,700 kWh embedded energy per million gallons for supply, treatment & distribution) converted using the electricity factor above
